decoded_text.generated: GPU warmup causes initial latency spikes that artificially inflate token counts before steady-state performance is reached. This transient phase includes overhead from memory allocation and kernel compilation that does not reflect actual inference throughput. Consequently, measurements taken during this period misrepresent the model's true processing speed and efficiency.
